sections.paragraph:
Original: כּסת

Transliteration: keseth

Phonetic: keh'-seth

BDB Definition:

  1. band, fillet, covered amulets, false phylacteries
    1. used by false prophetesses in Israel to support their demonic fortune-telling schemes

Origin: from H3680

TWOT entry: 1009a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
